name: Cornmeal Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F.
2. In a bowl, sift together the dry ingredients: flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. Cut in the shortening using your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add the egg and buttermilk to the dry ingredients. Mix with a fork until just combined.
5. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface. Knead gently for about 1 minute, then roll into a rectangle that is about 1/2-inch thick.
6. Cut the dough into 8 equal rounds using a 3-inch biscuit cutter.
7. Make a small indentation in the center of each round with the back of a knife.
8. Fold each round over itself to form a half-roll, pressing the fold gently to seal.
9. Brush the rolls lightly with butter and place on a baking sheet.
10. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot. Yield: about 8 rolls.
